title: ABC pass mangles synthesized logic on big endian architectures

features.name: priority mux encoder with multi-bit inputs and enable signal
features.description: Code should include a priority mux encoder module with 4-bit input buses, a 4-bit encoder_in, an enable signal, and a case statement for selection under enable condition

features.name: abc pass with lut optimization triggering big-endian pointer casting bug
features.description: Code should include a design that when processed through proc, pmux2shiftx, and abc -lut 6 passes on big-endian architectures triggers ABC's pointer casting bug between 32-bit and 64-bit word bitvectors
